item.title: NYC property tax controversy: Here's what to know
item.description: CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest attempt in New York to boost tax revenue.

item.title: Moncler shares struggle despite defying luxury's Middle East slump
item.description: Moncler earnings 'smashes' expectations following a series of underwhelming reports from European luxury players last week.

item.title: Kering looks to double profits as it unveils ambitious turnaround plan to revive Gucci
item.description: The "ReconKering" strategy announced Thursday includes more than doubling its 2025 recurring operating margin of 11.1%.

item.title: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings; Hermes sinks 8%
item.description: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East ...

item.title: IRS audit rate for high earners falls: Here's what to know
item.description: It's Tax Day, and all income groups have seen their chances of getting audited decline in recent years, but the highest earners have seen the largest ...
